text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Feliz! Año! Nuevo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And you know what that means! Let's get going!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I already got the tickets!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsure of what she's talking about, I let El
Condor Pasa lead me off.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: There it is! Let's gooo! The finishing hold!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding, ding, diiing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, we end up watching wrestling
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the match, we decide to walk around a
nearby amusement park.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! The heat of that match was incredible.
Nothing kicks off the new year quite like
wrestling!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it doesn't even feel like a new year has
started without watching a match!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's like watching a litter of cubs grow into lions.
Intense and... filled with heated moments!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That kind of fresh conflict is the real thrill of
wrestling! And that's exactly the kind of
competition I want!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wanna compete with Grass for the championship
belt someday!
choice_data_list: It has to be Grass Wonder?
It has to be Grass Wonder?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué? Well... someone else would be okay too,
but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I think Grass would make for the most fearsome
opponent.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Beneath her calm expression lurks an unbending,
unflagging—blazing blue flame that will never
burn out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I live with her, so I understand that better than
anyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to debuting in the same year as El
Condor Pasa, Grass Wonder is also her
roommate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And among her many rivals, it seems like El
Condor Pasa sees Grass Wonder as her biggest
rival.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Trainer, there is a reason I brought
you to a wrestling match today.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wanna learn some wrestling techniques this New
Year's!
choice_data_list: Do you think that'll be... useful?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It'll be hella useful! My papa is a wrestler and he
says the techniques are good for any sport!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now, here's where you come in! I want you to pick
what move I master!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Throws! I bet throwing a bunch of stuff will help
me strengthen my legs and hips!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: First up! Weight tossing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ten kilos? Ha. Twenty? Pshaw. Even thirty
kilograms is nothing with my strength!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'll throw a dragnet at the beach... facing
backwards!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ready, go! Fisher's suplex!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And lastly... Wh-what's that?! A sickeningly sweet
parfait challenge?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Barf! I haaate sweet things! This challenge sucks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, she decides to toss the rest of her
training. Still, it seems like throwing so many
things has made her stronger.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh! Sleeper holds! Submission is hella
important!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Break out or tap out! Gimme your best shot,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urgh... this is... tough. I can't move at all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But don't underestimate me! This is... this is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... See, I got out! Phew! That was... somethi...ng...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She falls asleep while we train. It's not what we
were going for, but it looks like we've managed
to lift some of her exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, tag team tactics! It's muy importante that
the two of us stay in sync!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's take on a ton of challenges together this
New Year's!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: First up, karaoke!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Duets, harmonizing, and cheering!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Next up, co-op gaming!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Fighting games, rhythm games, and shooters!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's do some dancing too! Get your breathing in
sync with mine and lift me up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We learn a lot of new movement patterns through
various cooperative games.
